Skill Path: Shrouded Subterfuge

You use the fanatism of Cults and Faiths to Lie and decieve them.

While developing your skills in Occultism you chose to focus specifically on Shrouded Subterfuge, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.r7cgrrHh75R8UEqN]{Deceptive Worship}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lEgYzFHransLkSvI]{Schooled in Secrets}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.r7cgrrHh75R8UEqN]{Deceptive Worship}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lEgYzFHransLkSvI]{Schooled in Secrets}
